# citability.dev

> AI Visibility Auditing. Measure whether AI systems can find, recommend, and cite your website.

## About

citability.dev is an AI visibility consulting service built on the AI Visibility Readiness (AVR) Framework v1.0. We measure what Ahrefs and Semrush don't: whether ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude can find you, recommend you, and cite you.

## Author

Chudi Nnorukam
- Website: https://chudi.dev
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/chudi-nnorukam
- GitHub: https://github.com/ChudiNnorukam

## Key Topics

- AI visibility auditing
- AI citability measurement
- AI recommendability testing
- AI infrastructure readiness
- llms.txt implementation
- AI crawler policies
- Structured data for AI retrieval
- SEO foundation for AI search

## Services

- Free Scan: 10 infrastructure + content checks in 60 seconds ($0)
- Quick Report: Full AI visibility + citability test with 20 queries ($147)
- Full Audit + Strategy Call: Complete audit with roadmap and 30-min call ($497)
- Implementation Sprint: 4 weeks of guided implementation ($1,997)

## Framework

The AVR Framework measures 3 pillars:
1. AI Visibility: Can AI systems find you?
2. AI Recommendability: Does AI suggest you?
3. AI Citability: Does AI link to your URL?

Open methodology: https://github.com/ChudiNnorukam/ai-visibility-readiness
